architecture_fit.note: Smooth 2D L2-distance head forms no block boundaries and does not solve the 2D-block task; canonical selectivity only 0.26.

baseline_comparison.note: Loses to the 1D-locality strawman at every block size (lift_over_baseline negative everywhere); is_obviously_broken=True.

faithfulness.note: Hand-built function with no model, no ablation, and no proposed causal check despite the synthetic setting.

operating_range.note: Sweeps b in {1,2,4} but fails across the whole range (block_robustness 0.12) rather than degrading gracefully.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Weights are hand-set (w_row=1.0, w_col=0.5) but the circuit fails to reproduce the target 2D-block behaviour.

visual_judgement.note: app.py fails boot-check (ModuleNotFoundError 'task', undefined attempts_dir, np not imported) and the heatmap is a hardcoded fabricated block, not real output.

visualisation_rationale.note: README names a selectivity bar chart and heatmap but the heatmap is synthetic/fabricated, undermining the rationale.

notes: The hand-built head is a smooth 2D-distance function that never respects block boundaries and is beaten by the provided 1D-locality strawman at every block size (negative lift throughout, is_obviously_broken=True), directly contradicting the README's claim. No benchmark.json was ever recorded (main.py lacks evaluate/record_benchmark and the results dir is empty; metrics above were recomputed by the grader), and app.py fails its boot-check while displaying a fabricated heatmap. Fails on architecture fit, baseline comparison, and faithfulness.
